description: Files that attract disproportionate review churn. When modified, trigger extra scrutiny in /pr-review.

refactor_candidates.reason: Master orchestrator with too many responsibilities — appeared in 5 PRs' fix rounds
refactor_candidates.recommendation: Split into session-init.js (env setup) and session-checks.js (health/validation)

refactor_candidates.reason: Alert pipeline handling safety + truncation + injection in one file — appeared in 4 PRs
